name: tgo
description: Open-source AI Agent Customer Service Platform. Build AI agent teams with LLM orchestration, RAG knowledge base, multi-channel support, and human collaboration.
summaryZh: Open-source AI Agent Customer Service Platform. Build AI agent teams with LLM orchestration, RAG knowledge base, multi-channel support, and human collaboration. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
